name: Kokum Sour
instructions: Dry shake gin, kokum syrup, sugar syrup and egg white without ice to build the foam, then shake again hard with ice. Double strain into a chilled coupe and finish with a few drops of bitters drawn through the foam. A Konkan riff built on the sour magenta fruit of the Konkan coast.

name: Kokum Highball
instructions: Build over plenty of ice: gin and kokum syrup, then top with cold soda and stir once. A Konkan riff built on the sour magenta fruit of the Konkan coast.

name: Bazaar Kokum
instructions: Fill a copper mug with ice. Add gin, lime juice and sugar syrup, top with cold ginger beer and give it one stir. A Konkan riff built on the sour magenta fruit of the Konkan coast.

name: Kokum Old Fashioned
instructions: Stir gin, jaggery syrup and the bitters over a large ice cube until cold and silky. Express an orange peel over the top. A Konkan riff built on the sour magenta fruit of the Konkan coast.

name: Kokum Collins
instructions: Shake gin, kokum syrup and sugar syrup with ice, strain into an ice-filled collins glass and top with soda. A Konkan riff built on the sour magenta fruit of the Konkan coast.

name: Midnight Kokum
instructions: Fill a wine glass with ice. Add kokum syrup and gin, top with prosecco and a splash of soda, and stir gently. A Konkan riff built on the sour magenta fruit of the Konkan coast.

name: Kokum Sling
instructions: Shake gin, kokum syrup and mango puree with ice, pour unstrained into a tall glass and lengthen with soda. A Konkan riff built on the sour magenta fruit of the Konkan coast.

name: Kokum Fizz
instructions: Dry shake everything but the soda, then shake with ice. Strain into a chilled glass and top with a splash of soda to lift the foam. A Konkan riff built on the sour magenta fruit of the Konkan coast.

name: Marigold Kokum
instructions: Stir gin, Campari, sweet vermouth and a barspoon of kokum syrup over ice, strain over a fresh cube and garnish with an orange slice. A Konkan riff built on the sour magenta fruit of the Konkan coast.

name: Kokum Martini
instructions: Stir gin, dry vermouth and a barspoon of kokum syrup over ice until very cold, then strain into a chilled martini glass. A Konkan riff built on the sour magenta fruit of the Konkan coast.

name: Gondhoraj Sour
instructions: Dry shake gin, gondhoraj lime, sugar syrup and egg white without ice to build the foam, then shake again hard with ice. Double strain into a chilled coupe and finish with a few drops of bitters drawn through the foam. A Kolkata riff built on Bengal's intensely fragrant lime.

name: Deccan Gondhoraj
instructions: Build over plenty of ice: gin and gondhoraj lime, then top with cold soda and stir once. A Kolkata riff built on Bengal's intensely fragrant lime.

name: Gondhoraj Mule

name: Gondhoraj Old Fashioned
instructions: Stir gin, jaggery syrup and the bitters over a large ice cube until cold and silky. Express an orange peel over the top. A Kolkata riff built on Bengal's intensely fragrant lime.

name: Coastal Gondhoraj
instructions: Shake gin, gondhoraj lime and sugar syrup with ice, strain into an ice-filled collins glass and top with soda. A Kolkata riff built on Bengal's intensely fragrant lime.

name: Gondhoraj Spritz
instructions: Fill a wine glass with ice. Add gondhoraj lime and gin, top with prosecco and a splash of soda, and stir gently. A Kolkata riff built on Bengal's intensely fragrant lime.

name: Gondhoraj Sling
instructions: Shake gin, gondhoraj lime and mango puree with ice, pour unstrained into a tall glass and lengthen with soda. A Kolkata riff built on Bengal's intensely fragrant lime.

name: Royal Gondhoraj
instructions: Dry shake everything but the soda, then shake with ice. Strain into a chilled glass and top with a splash of soda to lift the foam. A Kolkata riff built on Bengal's intensely fragrant lime.

name: Gondhoraj Negroni
instructions: Stir gin, Campari, sweet vermouth and a barspoon of gondhoraj lime over ice, strain over a fresh cube and garnish with an orange slice. A Kolkata riff built on Bengal's intensely fragrant lime.

name: Gondhoraj Martini
instructions: Stir gin, dry vermouth and a barspoon of gondhoraj lime over ice until very cold, then strain into a chilled martini glass. A Kolkata riff built on Bengal's intensely fragrant lime.
